languages.text: "Я выяснил{mf||а}, что за убийством стоит леди Драйвстем".

languages.text: "Ich habe herausgefunden, dass Lady Drivestem für den Mord verantwortlich war."

languages.text: “我已查明这起谋杀案的幕后主使是德莱夫斯塔夫人。”
languages.original_text: "I have discovered that Lady Drivestem was behind the murder."

traits.locale_text: “我已查明这起谋杀案的幕后主使是德莱夫斯塔夫人。”

languages.text: « J'ai découvert que dame Drivestem avait commandité le meurtre. »
languages.original_text: "I have discovered that Lady Drivestem was behind the murder."

languages.text: «He averiguado que lady Drivestem estuvo detrás del asesinato».
